xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ABriefOnTypesOfCustomersExplan: The Customers are manufacturers of Garments (upstream activity) out of cotton yarn and Knitted Fabrics sourced from the Company.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Manufacture of Cotton yarn is energy based
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: The company has installed windmills of 27.4 MW and Roof top solar power of 8.33 MW for renewable energy
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: The Main input Raw Cotton is an agricultural produce. Price is subject to fluctuation / Government policies
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Risk is mitigated by purchase across markets and settlement of contracts without any renegotiation
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: The non -leveraged financial position and maintenance of adequate liquidity ensures solvency and sustainability -
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MaterialIssueIdentified: Product Innovation / timely delivery / Maintenance of Quality
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Comfort and growth of the business of the Customers
Contributes to social development through Rural employment
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheNationalAndInternatio: The Company holds the following Certificates i. Global Organic Textile Standard (GOTS) ii. Better Cotton Platform iii. U.S. Cotton Trust Protocol (USCTP) iv. OEKO-TEX Fabric v. OEKO-TEX Recycled Polyester Cotton vi. OEKO-TEX Yarn vii. Recycled Claim Standard V2.0 (RCS) viii. Cotton Made In Africa (CMIA ix. Forest Stewardship Council (FSC) x. Global Recycled Standard V4.0 (GRS) xi. Organic Content Standard V3.0 (OCS) xii. Regenagri Content Standard xiii. Sedex

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:SpecificCommitmentsGoalsAndTar: It is the endeavour of the company to pursue the policies to the satisfaction of all the stakeholders
It is the endeavour of the company to pursue the policies to the satisfaction of all the stakeholders
It is the endeavour of the company to pursue the policies to the satisfaction of all the stakeholders
It is the endeavour of the company to pursue the policies to the satisfaction of all the stakeholders
It is the endeavour of the company to pursue the policies to the satisfaction of all the stakeholders
It is the endeavour of the company to pursue the policies to the satisfaction of all the stakeholders
It is the endeavour of the company to pursue the policies to the satisfaction of all the stakeholders
It is the endeavour of the company to pursue the policies to the satisfaction of all the stakeholders
It is the endeavour of the company to pursue the policies to the satisfaction of all the stakeholders
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StatementByDirectorResponsible: The product manufactured cotton yarn does not Involve any environmental risk. The challenge lies in use of electricity from TANGEDCO and other sources. The company has installed windmills 27.4 MW and Roof Top Solar Power 8.33 MW for captive consumption. The generation of renewable energy through wind and solar would contribute to Co2 reduction. Besides the entire plant’s soils are organically managed without use of fertilizers and pesticides. There are grown multiple tress within the Plant premises over the years turning out to be the Bird’s Paradise.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheHighestAuthorityRe: Board Committees in co-ordination with Board of Directors exercise and oversee implementation of various policies
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfSpecifiedCommitteeOfT: Board Committees in co-ordination with Board of Directors exercise and oversee implementation of various policies
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: The company since its incorporation strives to achieve excellence in corporate and statutory compliance and the Board consist of experienced and knowledgeable members who are all well aware of their responsibilities and company is complying with all such requirements. No specific training programmes are conducted in this respect.
The principles are constantly evolved and discussed frequently amongst key managerial personnels and are educated and no specific programmes are carried out.

There are regular meetings at plant level on health and safety working conditions and plants do’s and don’ts carried out by senior technicians regularly. No Count of meetings is maintained in this regard.

There are regular meetings at plant level on health and safety working conditions and plants do’s and don’ts carried out by senior technicians regularly. As multiple meetings are carried and no count of meetings is maintained in this respect.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheRegulatoryOrEnforceme: BSE and NSE has levied fine for non-compliance of Regulation 17(1)(b) and 17 (1A) of SEBI (LODR) Regulations 2015. The levy of fine was consequent to interpretation of the said regulations by the exchanges. The company has paid the fine and filed waiver applications with the exchanges.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheCase: Waiver application filed with the exchanges - NSE heard the Matter on 28.07.2025 and orders are awaited
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AntiCorruptionOrAntiBriberyPol: The Company has not laid down any such policy separately and would not engage itself in unwarranted practices which would bring disrepute to the company.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesInPlaceToS: The main input raw material for manufacture of cotton yarn is Raw cotton and is widely available, in a sustainable manner, sourced from domestic and imported
The main input raw material for manufacture of cotton yarn is Raw cotton and is widely available, in a sustainable manner, sourced from domestic and imported
The main input raw material for manufacture of cotton yarn is Raw cotton and is widely available, in a sustainable manner, sourced from domestic and imported
The main input raw material for manufacture of cotton yarn is Raw cotton and is widely available, in a sustainable manner, sourced from domestic and imported
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: Help Desk and Grievance Register and Whistle Blower Mechanism are in place to address complaints or issues raised
Help Desk and Grievance Register and Whistle Blower Mechanism are in place to address complaints or issues raised
Help Desk and Grievance Register and Whistle Blower Mechanism are in place to address complaints or issues raised
Help Desk and Grievance Register and Whistle Blower Mechanism are in place to address complaints or issues raised
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo: Identification of work related Hazards and its risk assessment is in place in respect of the entire manufacturing process and continuously reviewed
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: The company provides in-depth training and constant review and up gradation of such training to all its employees to protect themselves and prevention of injuries at the work place
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: Constant efforts are made to provide safe and secured environment work place to all the employees and workers at the plant level.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: The key stake holder groups are broadly categorized into Government, Employees, Shareholders, Customers and Suppliers.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Plant Management, Quality Maintenance, adherence to timely delivery of goods and protection of their interest and well being
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Annual General Meetings, Filings with Stock Exchanges and Press Releases
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Updating of various informations with regard to functioning of the company and more specifically with reference to financial reporting
For meeting quality requirements and ensuring timely supplies
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Through Government Portals and other permitted means
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: Yes, the Plant head oversees all such issues. The grievances related to human rights issues are addressed through the “Whistle Blower Mechanism” / Maintenance of Complaints book at Plant level. Constant education is made through internal meetings
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: The complainant is fully protected from any harassment
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT: There are no cases that are covered under Question 10 (above) and Question of corrective action does not arise.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DiscloseWhetherTargetsSetUnder: The Company falls under PAT8 scheme and the target year is 2025-2026
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AMechanismForZeroLiquidDischar: There is no requirement of water for manufacture of cotton yarn. Sewage water recycled in STP (Sewage Treatment Plant) installed within Plant premises used for gardening
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfProjectRelatedToReduc: The company has installed windmills 27.4 MW and Roof top solar power plant with a capacity of 8.33 MW at its Manufacturing Plants located at Dindigul in the State of Tamil Nadu for reduction of Co2 and to that extent contributes reduction of Global Warming and climate change . The entire power generated is for captive consumption.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfWasteManagementPracti: There are no hazardous and toxic chemical usage in our product and process
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheTradeAndIndustryChamb: Indian Chamber of Commerce and Industry
The Cotton Textiles Export Promotion Council
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: The Whistle Blower Policy formulated and made available would enable all stakeholders to raise their concerns. Besides the mechanism established at plant premises provides for proper recording of the grievances and redressal
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: Customers complaints, if any, are attended to and are resolved
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionsT:
Though, there is no specific policy formulated in this respect, there are multiple security Standard Operating Procedures are put in place ensuring no unauthorised access to data and providing cyber security.
None of the aforesaid matters arise or exists There are no such corrective actions taken or underway on issues relating to aadvertising, and delivery of essential services; cyber security and data privacy of customers; re-occurrence of instances of product recalls; penalty / action taken by regulatory authorities on safety of products/services
